title: Yuushya 16x
description: 16x realistic pack that changes the way Minecraft looks
body:
![](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/texture-pack/2022/607/15908265_l.webp)

Yuushya is a Minecraft resource pack makes overall changes to the appearence of almost everything in the game. If you don't feel enough **"Realistic"** of the Vanilla Minecraft, Yuushya is a cool choice for you. With fully elaborated texture to both environment and building blocks, Yuushya is ready for you to discover through the survival and creative modes.

Some of the further texture features required **Optifine** to work.

Also here we made a bushy leaves pack [Yuushya Foliage Addon](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/yuushya-foliage-addon/) which is better with shaders on.
